title: A Herobrine Modpack
description: This modpack adds Herobrine to the game to scare you. Includes From the Fog.
body: This modpack is a horror modpack based around Herobrine, more specificly, From the Fog. This modpack also includes Lights Out, which makes things darker, and some optimization mods to make the game a bit easier and run better. I made this modpack because From the Fog terrifies me and if you download horror modpacks, you probably like being scared. Have fun! Thank to to Lunar Eclipse Studios for making From the Fog and lights Out. The main optimization mod is Sodium.
